title: argemone cambrica
intro: Argemone cambrica, also known as the corn poppy or prickly poppy, is a flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Argemone cambrica include its ability to treat coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
